HYPERTANANANANANANANANANANANAAAAAAAAAAAA

Good friends with Katana (both have pets that are named Princess and Prince)
Hides his face with a blue/black helmet with “antennas” on the side which are not his real horns in his original design. He wears a black and blue outfit with a rifle that is the same color. He hides his face due to it being rotten, and both of his horns are broken due to a traumatic experience. 

Seraphlaser is the same but with changes. He has a red color with red wings and three red eyes displayed on the outer front of his helmet. Seraphlaser has a big chain around his neck. He has a red tie and a black outfit that seems to be revealing the upper right part of his shoulder/torso and arm while the other side is hidden by the black fabric. Lastly, his rifle is black and red.

How do i work these things!!?!?!
